rationale: Both evaluations hold the score at 3/10 and rest on identical job-relevant grounds: no C/UNIX embedded experience, no Linux kernel modification, no MACsec/802.1X networking security, and no Japanese proficiency. These differences are within ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
